column8: Paris Hilton is such famous that  she gets recognised whenever she goes.
column9: There were so many customers in the shop that I couldn't move!
column10: The man spoke such quickly that I couldn't understand a word he said.
column11: I had so good marks that my dad bought me a new computer!
column12: Victoria is so old that she can remember seeing a car for the first time.
column13: There was so a long queue that we decided to go home.
column14: I've got so a lot of friends that I don't have time to see them all.
column15: Big Brother was such successful that they're making another series.
